query: overcast gray sky monotone gloomy photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / muted_faded — overcast monotone gloom, low-vibrancy gray

response.objective_caption: A mountainous landscape beneath dense, layered storm clouds. Jagged mountain ridges and peaks recede into the distance, with valleys filled by mist and atmospheric haze. Sparse shrubs and vegetation occupy the lower portion of the frame, and the terrain slopes upward toward rocky summits on both sides. The sky contains varying densities of clouds with patches of lighter gray visible between thicker formations.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A mountainous landscape rendered in a muted, faded palette of desaturated blue and gray tones beneath dense, layered storm clouds. Jagged mountain ridges and peaks recede into mist-filled valleys, while sparse shrubs occupy the shadowed lower foreground. The scene evokes atmospheric distress and unease through its somber tonal choices, heavy cloud cover, and silhouetted terrain fading into hazy obscurity.
